denial_letter_text:
NOTICE OF ADVERSE BENEFIT DETERMINATION

Date of Notice: 01/23/2026
Cigna Open Access Plus (employer-sponsored group health plan)
Member ID: W101900560          Group #: GRP-1240
Authorization / Reference #: UM-2026-136901
Claim #: CLM-2026-200721
Date of Service (requested): 01/03/2026
Treating provider (as submitted): Northline Medical Group

Dear Member,

This document is notice of an adverse benefit determination. We received your provider's precertification / medical necessity review request on 01/05/2026 for Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit related to Generalized anxiety disorder (F41.1). After clinical review, we are unable to approve this request.

CASE SUMMARY
Service requested: Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit
Diagnosis (as submitted): Generalized anxiety disorder (F41.1)
Denial code: CO-96 — Non-covered charge — service denied as not medically necessary under plan criteria.
Clinical policy applied: Coverage Policy 100 under Cigna Medical Coverage Policy (CPG) and Milliman Care Guidelines (MCG)

EXPLANATION OF DECISION
Our review applied the criteria in Coverage Policy 100 and your plan's Summary Plan Description (SPD), Section 4 — Medical Benefits and Utilization Management. The documentation submitted does not demonstrate that the service is medically necessary for this member at this time. A lower level of care is appropriate for Generalized anxiety disorder (F41.1); Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit exceeds what is required. Outpatient management has not been exhausted per clinical guidelines.

Specifically, the information provided does not satisfy the utilization-management requirements associated with level of care too high. The clinical notes reviewed did not include sufficient detail to confirm that plan criteria were met. Diagnosis and procedure codes used in this determination are available upon request, as required by applicable federal standards.

If your provider wishes to discuss this determination, they may contact our physician review line. Any discussion must occur within the timeframe described in your plan materials.

YOUR RIGHT TO INFORMATION
You may request a copy of your claim file and the clinical criteria we used in this determination. Submit your request to the address on this notice or through your plan's member portal.

Your treating physician may request a peer-to-peer discussion with a Cigna medical director regarding this determination.

APPEAL RIGHTS
Appeals contact (as listed): Appeals Unit, P.O. Box 14582, Lexington, KY 40512-4582; Fax: (877) 555-0199.
You have the right to appeal this determination. If this denial is upheld after internal review, you may have the right to request an independent external review of our decision at no cost to you, subject to applicable federal and state requirements. To file a standard appeal, send a written request and supporting medical records within 180 days of the date of this notice. Include your member identification number (W101900560) and reference UM-2026-136901. You may also have the right to receive, upon request and without charge, copies of documents relevant to this determination.

Please note that benefits are subject to all terms, exclusions, and limitations of your group health plan document. This letter constitutes the formal adverse determination for the service identified above.

Sincerely,

Cigna Health Care Management
Medical Review Unit
clinical_context: The 27-year-old member has Generalized anxiety disorder (F41.1). She has been treated under commercial coverage with Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit recommended as the next appropriate step. GAD-7 remained 16 after 16 sessions; prior auth supported weekly therapy for acute worsening in March 2026. Submitted documentation supports medical necessity for Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit in the setting of Generalized anxiety disorder (F41.1); the denial letter does not discuss those records or cite the objective findings in the file.
